verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When troubles pile up just like a mountain you can't climb When you're discouraged seems like you're falling all the time When you're down and out and you start to doubt That's the time to find a place, to raise your hands and shout

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My God is greater Than all these things He's in control, he lifts my soul Until my spirit sings My God is greater Wonderful, mighty king of kings He holds forever in His hands My God is greater

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When others fail you, when disillusionment sets in When you're downhearted, feeling like you can never win When it a seems lost, is it worth the cost That's the time to turn your mind And face the mighty cross
